programme.desc: Murdoch, Watts and Choi investigate the overdose death of a bookkeeper living in new workers' housing.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects an overzealous fan after a man dies in an explosion meant for fledgling starlet, Ruth Higgins-Newsome.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates after a rare skull is stolen, and an interested buyer is murdered.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a field is found littered with decomposing bodies, Murdoch fears a sequential killer might be targeting men from other cultures.

programme.title: Blackwater Lane

programme.title: Stir of Echoes
programme.desc: After being hypnotized during a party, a man begins seeing visions involving the ghost of a young woman.
A man who specialises in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Marauders
programme.desc: A group of robbers is chased by an FBI agent who uncovers a deeper conspiracy behind the robbery-homicides.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Heathers [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Veronica (Winona Ryder) is part of the most popular clique at her high school, but she disapproves of the other girls' cruel behavior. When Veronica and her new boyfriend, J.D. (Christian Slater), confront clique leader Heather Chandler (Kim Walker) and accidentally poison her, they make it appear a suicide. Soon Veronica realizes that J.D. is intentionally killing students he does not like. She races to stop J.D. while also clashing with the clique's new leader, Heather Duke (Shannen Doherty).

programme.title: Bordertown [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez is a tenacious reporter investigating the murders of young women working in a bordertown.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: The Beastmaster
programme.desc: A sword-and-sorcery fantasy about a young man's search for revenge. Armed with supernatural powers, the handsome hero and his animal allies wage war against marauding forces

programme.title: CA$H
programme.desc: In this crime thriller starring Sean Bean and Chris Hemsworth, a down-and-out couple finds a briefcase of money that solves all their problems — until a menacing stranger forces them to commit armed robberies to pay it all back.

programme.title: The Myth Of Fingerprints
programme.desc: Four adult children return for Thanksgiving to their New England home--and their parents--after a three-year absence. Throughout the weekend, the children and their parents realize what they must give up in order to move on with their lives.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: An inside look into the world of modern journalism... and another world... looking for perfection... and finding only emptiness. Edited for TV

programme.title: Best Of The Best
programme.desc: After three months of grueling training under their unorthodox coach, members of the U.S. National Karate Team are ready to face the highly skilled Korean team and become true champions.

programme.title: Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Two brothers compete for women and success in the professional rodeo bull riding circuit.

programme.title: The Doctor Takes A Wife
programme.desc: A publicity stunt links a fiercely independent writer in matrimony with a chauvinistic medical school professor.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: The Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-type of tale stars Agar as a deposed prince trying to free his people from the evil rule of the caliph, the princess Narah (Lucille Ball) and his vizier, played by Burr. Agar enlists the aid of harem girl Patricia Medina and together they win back the province, while zipping around on a flying carpet.

programme.title: Operation Mad Ball
programme.desc: A lowly and bored United States Army private hatches a plan to spark some fun and romance at a hospital in postwar France.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: The Devil Bat
programme.desc: A mad scientist develops an aftershave lotion that causes his gigantic bats to kill anyone who wears it.

programme.title: The Kill Room

programme.title: Jiminy Glick In Lalawood
programme.desc: Culture critic Jiminy Glick gets tied up in a murder case at the Toronto Film Festival.

programme.title: Sharktopus vs. Pteracuda
programme.desc: An American scientist creates a half-pterodactyl, half-barracuda creature, Pteracuda, which inevitably escapes, leaving the Sharktopus to stop it.

programme.title: Bright Young Things
programme.desc: An adaptation of Evelyn Waugh's novel "Vile Bodies", is a look into the lives of a young novelist, his would-be lover, and a host of young people who beautified London in the 1930s.

programme.title: Killers Anonymous
programme.desc: At a support group of killers, the participants sit in a circle of trust and share their transgressions.

programme.title: Killing Gunther
programme.desc: Dysfunctional assassins attempt to murder Gunther, the most infamous hit man of all time.

programme.title: The Expendables 4
programme.desc: A new group of mercenaries joins the "old guard" to help fight an arms dealer with his own private army.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is an assassin in love. But a picture-perfect marriage will not save the couple from becoming targets.

programme.title: Killers Anonymous
programme.desc: At a support group of killers, the participants sit in a circle of trust and share their transgressions.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: Code of the Assassins
programme.desc: Trained by the best, a young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family's massacre years ago. Failing to complete his mission, he becomes a fugitive hunted by the government, rival assassin groups and other shadowy killers.

programme.title: Believer
programme.desc: A low-level drug dealer joins forces with an ambitious cop to bring down a psychotic cartel kingpin.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A former soldier is recruited for his toughest mission yet -- teaching a class of teen delinquents. As he kicks his way into their school and home lives, it becomes clear that his unconventional teaching style might be just what they need.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A maverick commander and a young general join forces to battle pirates who pillage small villages in 16th-century China. The violent clash of wits and weapons will ultimately decide who rules the land.

programme.title: Too Young to Be a Dad
programme.desc: A mother jeopardizes her own marriage when she offers to raise her grandchild.

programme.title: The Perfect In-Laws
programme.desc: Audrey goes to her husband's hometown and learns that her father-in-law passed.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: Following a difficult breakup in a string of failed relationships.

programme.title: Guilty at 17
programme.desc: Traci is lured into claiming she saw a teacher sexually harass a student.

programme.title: Too Young to Be a Dad
programme.desc: A mother jeopardizes her own marriage when she offers to raise her grandchild.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: In the quest to find her dream man, Ariel meets Daniel who shows that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Degree of Difficulty
programme.desc: Krystal and Morgan, two college graduates with opposing backgrounds, find themselves struggling to be successful in their chosen careers while dealing with real world issues.

programme.title: Grimy Situation
programme.desc: After being arrested at a young age during a drug deal gone wrong and spending part of her youth in prison for the attempted murder of Agent Harris, the now-paroled 30-year-old Camille Sanders has to find a way to make money without turning back to a life of crime and violating her parole. Struggling to survive with no source of income coming in, Camille's forced to live a double life to make ends meet while convincing her Parole Officer she's been

programme.title: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Jessica is the smartest girl on campus tutoring the most popular football player, Ryan. He is loved by many but he also has a few enemies. After the football team wins the championship game, Ryan decides to throw an after party at his house. When campus police find Ryan’s dead body, multiple people have a motive to want him dead. Will Jessica and her friend uncover the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Don't Ever Get Married
programme.desc: Jay, a cynical womanizer, bets his friend he can make his fiancée cheat before their wedding. Confident in his charm, he sets out to seduce her, unaware of the emotional turmoil he'll cause. As his plan spirals, Jay faces the consequences of his actions and the possibility of redemption.
Parents, concerned about their son’s violent behavior, learn that their son is the gateway to the apocalypse.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Giant Octopus
programme.desc: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A team of leading seismologists must stop a series of earthquakes before it breaks apart the Earth.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: War of the Worlds 2: The Next Wave
programme.desc: The aliens return to complete their plan of human domination, launching a second attack to destroy humanity.

programme.title: Ghosthouse
programme.desc: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past. After exploring the house, the group makes the foolish decision to split up, leading to a trail of death and destruction as the house unleashes its deadly past. Along the way expect severed heads, exploding light bulbs, demonic clown dolls, and creepy children. The clown doll is the main evil force from the film; the director of a funeral home stole it out of a child's coffin to give to his own daughter, leading to angry spirits possessing both the girl and the clown doll.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is put through the ringer, and hung out to dry, after sitting through this movie. She should have quit while she was a head!

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira's couch is infested with pesky little critters who are clearly Gremlin rejects. The only way she's gonna get rid of them is to endure this flick.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is no stranger to man-eating women, but she may have bit off more than she can chew in this indigestible entree, staring Adrianne. Barbau, Shannon Tweed, and Bill Maher whos still trying to live this turkey down.

programme.title: V/H/S/99
programme.desc: V/H/S/99 harkens back to the final punk rock analog days of VHS, while taking one giant leap forward into the hellish new millennium. In V/H/S/99, a teenager's home video leads to a series of horrifying revelations. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL

programme.title: Kandisha
programme.desc: Three childhood friends invoke the spirit of a vengeful creature in a game that turns into a living nightmare after their loved ones begin to disappear.

programme.title: Baskin
programme.desc: Five cops stumble upon the blood-spattered bowels of Hell where dark rituals and unspeakable horrors await in this head-spinning freak-out.

programme.title: Leap of Faith: William Friedkin on The Exorcist
programme.desc: Leap of Faith: William Friedkin on The Exorcist

programme.title: The Cellar
programme.desc: About a week after the Woods family move in to Xaos House, their daughter Ellie goes missing during a power cut. The odd thing is, that she was on the phone to her mother Keira at the time, counting down the ten steps into the cellar to find the fuse box. Frustrated by the lack of leads, Keira investigates and finds that the walls have strange symbols engraved into them. After a number of terrifying supernatural experiences, she comes to the conclusion that the house took Ellie. She discovers that a physicist and occultist called John Fetherston, who was obsessed with finding the 11th dimension, built the house and engraved sinister equations on the 10 steps leading into the cellar. Finally, she must battle with the universe's most ancient evil, or lose her family's souls forever.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

From the high-speed precision of JCB Racing to the gravity-defying stunts of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, every driver—including fan favorites like Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Armando Castro in El Toro Loco—pushes their 12,000-pound machine to the limit. programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the first time in history, Strongman Champions League will set up competition in Abu Dhabi. The line-up of super athletes, who are part of the SCL, includes former world champions Dainis Zageris (Latvia) & Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland), current world champion Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and biggest strongman in the World Sean O’Hagan (Ireland).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage six of Strongman champions league, 2018 is set back on north, in Finland. programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly attempts to make a viral "Croffle" (croissant waffle) out of puff pastry, but chaos ensues when he messes up the first try. Pivoting quickly, he serves it up as a warm dessert with ice cream and chocolate syrup. The hosts hilariously discuss the realities of aging and male menopause.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Guest chef Christian Petroni brings his energy to the kitchen to cook Rigatoni Alla Vodka except he swaps the vodka for red wine. The crew debates "sauce versus gravy," discusses the proper saltiness of pasta water, and reveals the foods they absolutely despise. The episode ends with a giveaway of Christian's cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces "sweater weather" by making a savory Butternut Squash, Spinach, and Blue Cheese Pie. While he cooks, the hosts discuss expensive clothing habits and the woes of tight pants. A cooking question about pie layers hilariously derails into a conversation about dating terminology, and Michael reveals he is passing the Thanksgiving hosting torch to his son. The episode concludes with Michael giving away a lucky golf putter.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipe - XO Fries & Crispy Shrimp Rolls - Chris and Andrew make two more recipes from Dinner Time Live with David Chang: XO Fries and Crispy Shrimp Rolls. The XO Fries start with a bed of golden French Fries, then topped with a pile of Chinese BBQ pork and covered with a savory, slightly spicy XO sauce (made from dried seafood, ham, shallots and chili oil). The Crispy Shrimp Rolls are inspired by the famous crispy shrimp tacos from Mariscos Jalisco—a legendary food truck in LA.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Mochi Potato Ball" - Testing out a viral recipe for cheese-stuffed Mochi Potato Balls with Honey Butter, Chris wonders whether he’s stumbled upon a quick hack for squishy rice balls or just a long way to nowhere.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Burger Stacking Order" - A rigorous study on the most structurally sound way to assemble a classic cheeseburger. No slippage allowed.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes" - Chris prepares one of the all-time most popular dishes from New York Times Cooking: Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes. Tune in to see if the dish lives up to its poetic name.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Salt-Broiled Fish" - After a visit to the studio from Liwei Liao (@dry_aged_fish_guy), Chris finds himself with a beautiful sea bream that’s begging to be prepared simply. Salt-roasting, it is.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino explains the difference between Italians from Italy and Italian Americans. Dishes include: Salsiccie al Sugo (sausages braised in tomato sauce ) / Pasta alla Nanci (with Ricotta cheese) / Pasta with Shrimp (Linguine and Shrimp in white wine) / Sicilian Fish Soup / Pannacotta (chocolate pudding with berries and mint).

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino paints the picture of a life expressing himself through his plating. Dishes include: Red Wine Sauce / Scalloped Potatoes (with Swiss and Parmesan cheese) / Steak au Poivre with Garlic Arugula / Salmon with Brussel Sprouts and Red Wine Sauce.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino explores the complexities of the tomato. Dishes include: Tomato Salad (Cherry tomatoes with mozzarella and onions) / Tonno alla Puttanesca (Tuna steaks with a special tomato sauce) / Blueberry Crumble.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino shares the story of how his father's dream became his reality as he prepares Vincenzo's favorite dishes, including:: Mussels with Garlic and Ginger / Swordfish with Peas and Tomato Sauce / Gelo Di Melone (Watermelon pudding).

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick recounts the first time a group of friends treated him to his first American breakfast and the influence it had on him as a chef. Dishes include: Eggs Benedict "Stellino Style" / Poached Eggs over Chorizo Hash with Tequila Sauce / Chocolate Chip Pancakes.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Stellino tells us about the time his parents visited him in America and he brought them to a Steak House with a surprising menu choice from his late father. Dishes include: Reverse Sear Steak with Port Wine Sauce and Pan Fried Mushroom and Arugula / Wedge Salad.

programme.title: Nick Stellino: Storyteller in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nick shares with us the importance of Sundays and how the day and certain dishes remind him of his family in Sicily. Dishes include: Potatoes with Sun Dried Tomatoes and Rosemary / Pork Chop with Pizzaiola Sauce / Pasta Agghiu e Ogghiu (Pasta with Garlic and Olive Oil).

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re exploring how to make your home more accessible for those with physical limitations due to age, accident, or illness.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Whether for environmental or monetary reasons, everyone wants to save energy in their home. We’re exploring some simple ways to make your home more energy efficient, from heating and cooling to insulation and lighting.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Find out how to turn your house into a high-tech home without spending a fortune. From wireless cameras and speakers to home security and lighting, we’ve got some practical electronic ideas for your home that won’t break the bank!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If the kitchen is the heart of the home, then a kitchen renovation is like open heart surgery. We’re taking a look at three very different kitchen remodels, from classic to contemporary, all of which result in a more functional and attractive kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The type and style of flooring in your house has a big impact on the look and feel of your home. We’re exploring some innovative, DIY friendly flooring options that make installing a new floor in your home a whole lot easier.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: These five home improvement projects can really update the look of your home without breaking your budget. Some are do-it-yourself projects, while others are best tackled by a professional.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Often the most effective enhancements for a home’s interior are the easiest to accomplish. With a few pieces of molding and a little elbow grease we’re making some great improvements for some happy homeowners.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Buying a house is always a chore; but when it’s your first time, it’s both a challenge and an adventure. And when the house is a fixer-upper, that adventure becomes a way of life. Find out about buying a house in the first of our six-part series.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the second of our six-part series, the paperwork is done, but the fun has just begun as our First Time Homeowner tackles much needed renovations before she can move into her new home. Whether it’s repairs or improvements, there’s a lot to learn!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season 2 premiere. Mar Jennings, known as America's Top Lifestyle Expert, is ready to renovate all the homes on his Westport, CT street. First up is a huge addition for neighbors Andrea and Bob's 1930's saltbox. Find out if Mar's new design team is up for the challenge. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season premiere part 2. Mar began a huge addition on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. But at the beginning of the dining and den walkthrough the homeowners were unreadable. Tune in to see if they will approve of Mar's progress and designs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. Amid creating the serene décor, Mar also finds a practical way to hide a litter box, and his team takes bets on which design his fans vote for.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: In this outdoor transformation episode, Mar is thrilled to reveal the final touches on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. Complete landscaping, outdoor dining and patio, garage, driveway, gas lantern and so much more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The holidays are in full swing on Mar's. Join America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his home makeover team as they enjoy Westport CT during the holidays with activities like caroling, sleigh rides, shopping and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his team love seeing their plans come to life. And when it's a hands-on project, Mar can't resist being inspired by his favorite '70's bionic TV heroes.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Bungalow transformation is complete and ready to reveal. It's down to the wire on finishing this home in time for an open house. Yvonne and Mar have overseen all the construction and renovation, but now there's a rush to finish the staging.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: On the borders of Mexico and Guatamala, Belize is a wild, impenetrable land, and one of the least-populated countries on Earth. Offshore, the circular Great Blue Hole is one of the largest marine sinkholes in the world at 300 meters wide, and 108 meters deep, and offers a unique diving experience.

programme.title: Recreating Eden
programme.desc: Through her various horticultural initiatives, such as You Grow Girl, Gayla Trail has sown the seed of possibility in people's hearts as to how they too can help rebalance our urban environments to include more healthy green spaces.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY: Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY and Provincetown, MA: Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland: Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep fried pizza, deep fried mars bars, and deep fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England: In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony catches a Bayou alligator, cools off with a world-famous snow cone, gets in trouble with the law, eats jambalaya with a dancing chef, and relaxes to some local jazz.

programme.title: Tastes Like Home
programme.desc: Catherine travels to Osijek where she soaks in the local culture before learning how to prepare Croatian Sarma, a dish the Matkovic family is hoping she will pass along to them so they may create and savor their own tastes from home.

programme.title: Savour Australia
programme.desc: Jason experiences Brisbane, a city with a beautiful Public Art Trail, and he also travels to Noosa to enjoy its Night Markets. Acclaimed chef Peter Kuruvita then teaches Jason how to cook a classic Sri Lankan dish.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy's iconic first dish is Crispy Belly Pork. In the classroom Joe Swash creates Veggie Singapore Noodles. Jeremy then makes Tea Smoked Duck and Pancakes, followed by a Macanese Egg Tart, the perfect accompaniment for a cup of tea.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Messinia, Diane visits with a good friend who helps her discover the secrets of this rich, giving land that is blessed with a perfect climate. The region is home to the world's first system of culinary provenance, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: In Chianti, we celebrate true Chianti at Castello di Ama, and at Busatti in Anghiari, 100-year-old looms craft fine fabrics. We will also hunt wild boar and meet butcher Dario Cecchini in Panzano, and ride with the butteri in Maremma.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Beginning in the awe-inspiring Dingle Peninsula, Mickela dances with David Geaney, goes on a walking food tour of Dingle, sits in on a trad session with SuperCeili at The Dingle Music Shop, and is then taught the brush dance in Killarney.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: From Israeli folk dance at the 92Y to eating knishes in the Lower East Side, Mickela spends some quality time getting to know one of New York's most cultural and religiously pious populations.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested for domestic violence threatens to put all the officers in jail. Inmates on kitchen duty get into a fist fight over a dish towel.
